CREATE TABLE xml_samples (id INTEGER, xml_data XMLType);
SELECT id, xml_data.isSchemaBased() FROM xml_samples WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, xml_data.isSchemaBased() FROM xml_samples WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, xml_data.isSchemaBased() FROM xml_samples WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, xml_data.isSchemaBased() FROM (SELECT XMLType('<nested><clean /></nested>') AS xml_data, id FROM xml_samples) AS nested_results WHERE id = 1;
SELECT a.id, a.xml_data.isSchemaBased(), b.xml_data.isSchemaBased() FROM xml_samples AS a JOIN xml_samples AS b ON a.id = 2 AND b.id = 3;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_samples WHERE xml_data.isSchemaBased() = 1;
SELECT id FROM xml_samples WHERE xml_data.isSchemaBased() IN (SELECT 1 FROM dual);
WITH sample AS (SELECT XMLType('<test />') AS xml_data) SELECT xml_data.isSchemaBased() FROM sample;
SELECT MAX(xml_data.isSchemaBased()) AS max_schema_based FROM xml_samples GROUP BY id;
SELECT CASE WHEN xml_data.isSchemaBased() = 1 THEN 'Schema-Based' ELSE 'Not Schema-Based' END AS schema_status FROM xml_samples;
